Package de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.builder

Class FindProblemInformation

java.lang.Object
org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.AbstractParseTreeVisitor<T>
de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.KeYParserBaseVisitor<T>
de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.builder.FindProblemInformation
All Implemented Interfaces:
KeYParserVisitor<Object>, ParseTreeVisitor<Object>
public class FindProblemInformation extends KeYParserBaseVisitor<T>
The visitor for extracting the ProblemInformation.

    • visitFile

      public Object visitFile(KeYParser.FileContext ctx)
      Description copied from class: KeYParserBaseVisitor
      Visit a parse tree produced by KeYParser.file().

      The default implementation returns the result of calling AbstractParseTreeVisitor.visitChildren(org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.RuleNode) on ctx.

      Specified by:
      visitFile in interface KeYParserVisitor<Object>
      Overrides:
      visitFile in class KeYParserBaseVisitor<Object>

      ctx - the parse tree
      Returns:
